heading: Membership
label: 40503 Membership

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: An individual who has been awarded the Medal of Honor as presented by Congress is eligible for membership in the corporation. An honorary membership may not be granted.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each member has one vote on each matter submitted to a vote at a meeting of the members. The vote may be cast in person or by proxy.
